_comment: Example plugin manifest. Deploy as 'Plugins/plugins.json' next to the plugin DLLs. In Production plugin policy this is the allowlist: only listed + enabled plugins load, and any entry with an 'sha256' must match the DLL's SHA-256 (lowercase hex) or it is refused. In Developer policy unlisted DLLs still load (with a warning). Generate hashes with the SHA-256 helper / packaging step (see PR7). Selecting production: PluginSystem::SetLoadPolicy(PluginLoadPolicy::Production) or env HEXENGINE_PLUGIN_POLICY=production.
